title: Mumbri Storve
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Structure |image=[[File:Mumbri_Storve.jpg]] |name=Mumbri Storve |constructed= |destroyed= |type=[[Cantina/Legends|Cantina]]''[[The Last Command]]'' |location=[[Unidentified planet (Dona Laza)|Unidentified planet]] |interest= |rebuilt= |builder= |height= |width= |affiliation= }} {{Quote|Hello, Antilles. Nice to see you again.''"
"''The feeling's mutual, I'm sure. Who is this?''"
"''Oh, come now. Have you forgotten already those wonderful times we spent together outside the Mumbri Storve cantina?''"
"''''Aves''?''"
"''Hey, very good. Your memory's getting better.''"
"''You people are starting to be hard to forget. Where are you?''"
"''Right smack in the middle of that big blaze of Imperial lights off on your flank. I wish you'd told me you were hitting this place instead of Tangrene like we thought.|[[Aves]] and [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] during the [[Battle of Bilbringi (9 ABY)|Battle of Bilbringi]]|}} The '''Mumbri Storve''' was a seedy [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] situated on a [[Unidentified planet (Dona Laza)|planet]] located in the [[Dona Laza sector/Legends|Dona Laza sector]] of the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]].{{Planetnamia|other=the [[Dona Laza]] [[Tapcafe/Legends|tapcafe]]|system=[[Dona Laza system/Legends|Dona Laza system]]|legends=1}}{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} — Based on corresponding data for [[Dona Laza system/Legends|Dona Laza system]] ==History== During the [[Thrawn campaign]] of [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]], the [[New Republic pilot/Legends|New Republic pilots]] [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]], [[Derek Klivian/Legends|Derek Klivian]] and [[Wes Janson/Legends|Wes Janson]] went to the Mumbri Storve just prior to the [[Battle of Bilbringi (9 ABY)|Battle of Bilbringi]]. They spent an [[Standard hour/Legends|hour]] at the [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] in an attempt to drop a hint that the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] would be attacking [[Tangrene]] instead of [[Bilbringi system/Legends|Bilbringi]]. They were successful at first, as they were being followed by a [[Unidentified Aqualish Imperial spy|Walrus-faced]] [[Aqualish/Legends|Aqualish]] [[Spy/Legends|spy]]. However, they were intercepted on their way out by [[Aves]], a member of [[Talon Karrde]]'s [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]] [[Car'das/Legends|organization]]. Aves and two of his men then neutralized the [[Mercenary/Legends|freelance]] [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] spy by knocking him unconscious. Aves assured Antilles that the Aqualish freelancer would not be making any reports anytime soon for the [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]]. As a result, their [[Local day/Legends|evening]] spent spreading disinformation seemed entirely wasted. In order to accomplish their objective anyway, Antilles dropped Aves a hint that the New Republic would be attacking Tangrene in twenty-eight hours, in the possibility that the smuggler would sell the information to the Empire. The [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] and the group of smugglers then parted ways, with Aves telling Antilles that any messages left with the night [[Bartender/Legends|bartender]] at the [[Dona Laza]] [[Tapcafe/Legends|tapcafe]] would reach him. Following the encounter, Aves and his men left the scene aboard a [[Landspeeder/Legends|landspeeder]], taking with them the still-unconscious Aqualish spy.[[The Last Command 5|''The Last Command'' 5]] ==Appearances== *''[[The Last Command]]'' {{Ab|The Last Command (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}} *[[The Last Command 5|''The Last Command'' 5]] ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' {{ID|Mumbri Storve Cantina}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Mumbri Storve#legends }} [[Category:Cantinas]]
